559 V0100A_PRIOR_FED_OBRA_CD V0100A_PRIOR_FED_OBRA_CD V0100A Prior Assessment Federal OBRA Reason for Assessment Code CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the Federal OBRA Reason for Assessment of the most recent prior OBRA or Scheduled PPS assessment. 01=Admission assessment (required by day 14)
02=Quarterly review assessment
03=Annual
